chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No.456 of 2024 HCA No.457 of 2024 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Muhammad Osman Ali Hadi 1. For orders on CMA No.411/25 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.2770/24 ------ 06.03.2025 Mr. Fayaz Ali Metlo, advocate for appellant. Mr. Mukesh Kumar G.Karara advocate for Respondent No.2. a/w Sajid Ali Channa advocate. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- By consent these appeals are disposed of, whereby the status-quo between parties insofar as issues in Suit No.1942 of 2018 are concerned shall continue for 10 days from today or any date within 10 days when appellant may file, if advised, an application for stay before the learned Single Judge, where the suit is pending. We are sanguine the suit will be decided by the learned Single Judge/trial Court on its own merits independent of any observations either passed by earlier or by this Court in HCA. 2. Accordingly, both these HCAs disposed of along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Imran
